events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: the missing load reactor on long VFD motor leads is flagged as a **fail** (high risk, installed-defective/non-compliant), since without the reactor the reflected-wave voltage overshoot on long cable runs stresses motor winding insulation and violates the manufacturer's installation instructions enforced via NEC 110.3(B)/430. Since it's only rough-complete, correction (installing the properly sized reactor and re-testing insulation) is still low-cost before closeout.
